verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate and useful, but it over-simplifies the co-payment rules, omits licensing/official-rule caveats, and should tighten a couple of healthcare/referral statements.

issues.current: Цена в 2026 чаще 200–500 €/мес и зависит от доходов семьи
issues.problem: The price range may be a reasonable practical estimate, but 'depends on family income' is imprecise for IPSS responses with cooperation agreements: the user contribution is normally calculated from the per-capita income of the user's household/agregado familiar under the institution's rules, not simply the broader family's income. Relatives outside the household may or may not be relevant depending on the contract/internal regulation.
issues.suggestion: Write: "В IPSS с acordo de cooperação mensalidade обычно считается как comparticipação familiar по rendimento per capita do agregado familiar пользователя и regulamento interno; родственники вне household не всегда входят в расчёт, но центр может просить данные/гаранта по своим правилам."
issues.source: Instituto da Segurança Social guidance on respostas sociais / comparticipação familiar; Portaria 196-A/2015 framework for cooperation agreements

issues.current: У IPSS с acordo de cooperação цена обычно не “фиксированная как абонемент”, а mensalidade/comparticipação familiar, рассчитанная по доходам семьи и правилам учреждения.
issues.problem: Same imprecision: for co-financed social responses the usual basis is rendimento per capita do agregado familiar, with deductions/criteria in the institution's rules. 'Доходы семьи' is too broad and can mislead readers into thinking every adult child/relative's income is automatically included.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "... рассчитанная по rendimento per capita do agregado familiar пользователя, с учётом regulamento interno/tabela de comparticipações; попросите формулу расчёта и список учитываемых доходов/вычетов письменно."
issues.source: Instituto da Segurança Social guidance on respostas sociais / comparticipação familiar; Portaria 196-A/2015

issues.current: Cuidados Continuados — медицинско-реабилитационная сеть после болезни/госпитализации, через SNS
issues.problem: Oversimplified. RNCCI referral is usually made by hospital discharge teams or primary/community healthcare teams, and the network has health and social-support components; depending on unit type and duration, user co-payment can apply for the social component. Saying only 'через SNS' hides the Segurança Social/means-tested part.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Cuidados Continuados/RNCCI — реабилитация и продолжительный уход после болезни/госпитализации; encaminhamento обычно делает больничная equipa de gestão de altas или equipa do Centro de Saúde. Часть расходов может зависеть от доходов, особенно в units with social-support component."
issues.source: SNS / ACSS / Segurança Social information on Rede Nacional de Cuidados Continuados Integrados

issues.current: На cartasocial.pt выберите distrito, concelho, freguesia и resposta social “Centro de Dia”. В карточках обычно видно entidade, morada, telefone, capacidade и иногда situação da resposta.
issues.problem: Correct as a search route, but it should warn that Carta Social capacity/contact data is administrative and may lag reality; vacancy/queue status must be confirmed directly with the institution.
issues.suggestion: Add: "Carta Social не гарантирует наличие vaga и иногда отстаёт от реальной ситуации; после поиска звоните в instituição/IPSS и уточняйте vagas, lista de espera, acordo de cooperação и transporte."

issues.current: Документ пожилого: Cartão de Cidadão, ВНЖ или паспорт; NIF пожилого ... Número de utente SNS ...
issues.problem: For foreigners this list is useful but misses a practical document often requested by IPSS/Social Security-linked entities: NISS or proof of Social Security situation/benefits, especially when assessing income, pensions, social benefits, or applying for social support. It is not always mandatory for admission, but omission is a practical gap.
issues.suggestion: Add an item: "NISS/документы Segurança Social — если есть пенсия, complemento, apoios sociais или если центр просит проверить situação contributiva/prestações."
issues.source: Instituto da Segurança Social practical procedures for social responses

issues.current: Only Carta Social, Segurança Social idosos, and Segurança Social IPSS are cited.
issues.problem: For a guide giving practical rules on services, contracts and co-payments, the sources are acceptable but thin. It should include an official source specifically describing Centro de Dia / social responses for older people and, ideally, the legal/cooperation framework for comparticipação familiar.
issues.suggestion: Add an official Segurança Social practical guide/page for 'Apoios Sociais para Pessoas Idosas' or 'Centro de Dia', and cite the cooperation/co-payment framework such as Portaria 196-A/2015 where discussing IPSS acordo de cooperação and comparticipação familiar.

missing_topics: How to check whether a centre is licensed/officially registered and whether it has acordo de cooperação versus being fully private
Vacancy/lista de espera is not guaranteed by Carta Social; always confirm directly with the institution
Co-payment formula should be requested in writing: rendimento per capita do agregado familiar, deductions, extras, absences, transport, diapers/medicines
RNCCI/Cuidados Continuados referral path and possible means-tested social co-payment
